title: leiothylax drummondii
intro: Leiothylax drummondii, also known as Drummond's saxifrage or drummond saxifrage, is a rare, alpine plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and may also have antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Leiothylax drummondii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
